summary: HR Module Enterprise Readiness Validation Complete - All 4 mandatory fixes verified. Fixed critical security bug: bank_account_number_encrypted was being exposed in API responses.

fixed.issue: bank_account_number_encrypted was being returned in API responses - SECURITY BUG
fixed.fix: Added bank_account_number_encrypted to MongoDB projection exclusion in both endpoints

passed_tests: CEO login (ceo@wisedrive.com / password123)
Navigate to HR Module → Employees tab
Employee modal Details tab has all required sections
Personal Information section (Name, Email, Phone, DOB, Gender)
Address section (Street, City, State, Pincode)
Employment Details section (Country, Joining Date, Employment Type, Weekly Off, Reporting Manager, Payroll Active)
Emergency Contact section (Name, Phone, Relation)
Bank Details section (Bank Name, Account Holder, Account Number, IFSC, Branch, PAN)
'Encrypted at rest' label visible for bank details
API: GET /api/hr/employees/{id} - new fields present
API: POST /api/hr/employees - create with all new fields
API: PUT /api/hr/employees/{id} - update new fields
API: bank_account_number_encrypted NOT returned in responses (FIXED)
API: bank_account_number_masked returned correctly
API: hashed_password NOT returned in responses
API: GET /api/hr/employees/{id}/documents - CEO can access all
API: POST /api/hr/employees/{id}/documents - CEO can create sensitive docs
API: Finance role cannot see sensitive documents (aadhaar, pan, passport, bank_statement)
API: POST /api/hr/payroll/preview - excludes employees with payroll_active=false
API: payroll_active flag can be toggled
Storage service exists with S3 configuration
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: bank_account_number_encrypted was being exposed in GET /api/hr/employees and GET /api/hr/employees/{id} - this was a security vulnerability
Encryption service uses PBKDF2 with SHA256 and 480,000 iterations - good security practice
Storage service properly abstracts local vs S3 storage with factory pattern
Document RBAC correctly restricts sensitive document types (aadhaar, pan, passport, bank_statement) from Finance role
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added bank_account_number_encrypted to MongoDB projection exclusion in GET /api/hr/employees (line 1308) and GET /api/hr/employees/{id} (line 1381)
seed_data_creation: Created test employees with all new fields during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: HR enterprise readiness validated. 4 mandatory fixes verified: 1) New employee fields (joining_date, date_of_birth, address, emergency_contact, reporting_manager, payroll_active) all present in UI and API, 2) Bank details encryption working with AES-256 via Fernet, masked values returned, 3) Document RBAC enforced - Finance cannot see sensitive docs, 4) Storage service configurable for S3. Fixed critical security bug where encrypted bank account was being exposed in API.

new_employee_fields.address: WORKING - address, city, state, pincode present
new_employee_fields.employment: WORKING - joining_date, employment_type, weekly_off_day, reporting_manager_id, payroll_active present
new_employee_fields.bank_details: WORKING - bank_name, account_holder_name, ifsc_code, pan_number, bank_branch present

bank_encryption.encryption: WORKING - AES-256 via Fernet with PBKDF2 key derivation
bank_encryption.masked_display: WORKING - Shows XXXX XXXX XXXX 1234 format
bank_encryption.api_security: FIXED - bank_account_number_encrypted no longer returned in API

document_rbac.finance_access: WORKING - Cannot see sensitive docs (aadhaar, pan, passport, bank_statement)

storage_strategy.s3: WORKING - S3StorageService with AES256 server-side encryption
storage_strategy.factory: WORKING - get_storage_service() reads STORAGE_TYPE env var

payroll_active_filtering.toggle: WORKING - Can toggle payroll_active flag on employees

bug_fix_details.issue: bank_account_number_encrypted was being returned in API responses
bug_fix_details.root_cause: MongoDB projection in GET /api/hr/employees and GET /api/hr/employees/{id} only excluded hashed_password, not bank_account_number_encrypted
bug_fix_details.verification: All 14 backend tests now pass, encrypted value no longer in API responses
